creator: ler@FreeBSD.org
text:
I can't reproduce the error on my 10.1-RELEASE-p13 jail:
borg.lerctr.org /home/ler $ sudo poudriere testport -p host-ports  -j p101amd64 -o sysutils/lsof

--End CONFIGURE_ARGS--

--End CONFIGURE_ENV--

--MAKE_ENV--

--End MAKE_ENV--

PREFIX=%D
LOCALBASE=/usr/local
RESETPREFIX=/usr/local
PORTDOCS=""
PORTEXAMPLES=""
LIB32DIR=lib
DOCSDIR="share/doc/lsof"
EXAMPLESDIR="share/examples/lsof"
DATADIR="share/lsof"
WWWDIR="www/lsof"
ETCDIR="etc/lsof"
--End PLIST_SUB--

--SUB_LIST--
PREFIX=/usr/local
LOCALBASE=/usr/local
DATADIR=/usr/local/share/lsof

ETCDIR=/usr/local/etc/lsof
--End SUB_LIST--

---Begin make.conf---

WRKDIRPREFIX=/wrkdirs
PORTSDIR=/usr/ports
PACKAGES=/packages
DISTDIR=/distfiles
